hero.description: Premium blackwork and fine line tattooing focused on precision, atmosphere, and permanence. Operating out of a private studio designed for the dedicated collector.

studio.subtitle: The Studio
studio.p1: Ink 'n Pain is not a street shop. It is a private, appointment-only creative space designed to provide the highest echelon of tattoo artistry in a clean, distraction-free environment.
studio.p2: We believe getting tattooed should be as premium as the art itself. From the initial consultation to the final aftercare instructions, every step is curated for excellence.

artist.subtitle: The Artist
artist.p1: With years of experience blending modern techniques with classic fundamentals, I approach every project not just as a piece of art, but as an architectural permanent addition to the human form.
artist.p2: My primary focus in the studio is blackwork, fine line, and surrealism. I work closely with my clients to ensure the final piece is both deeply personal and aesthetically timeless.

gallery.subtitle: Portfolio
gallery.p1: To maintain our standard of quality, we take on a limited number of new projects each month. We prioritize concepts that align with our artistic direction.

whyUs.subtitle: Philosophy
whyUs.description: We believe a tattoo studio should operate with the precision of a clinic but feel like a private atelier. Here is what defines our process.
whyUs.f1_desc: Hospital-grade sterilization protocols. Your safety is a non-negotiable fundamental.
whyUs.f2_desc: Every design is drawn specifically for the client. Your identity, permanently realized.
whyUs.f3_desc: A private, distraction-free environment allowing deep focus during the execution.

list.text: Deze shop heeft 2 nieuwe vaste klanten erbij gekregen... Het voelde alsof we op visite waren en we hadden gelijk een gevoel van thuis!
list.author: LUC

list.text: I walked in to ask for a fine line tattoo and he did it the same day, the tattoo is 1:1 to what i showed.
list.author: RALUCA GEORGESCU

list.text: Vroeger had men een lijfarts. Maar Ink 'n Pain begint nu wel een lijfinker te worden..
list.author: ALEX KES

faq.subtitle: Knowledge
faq.q1: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a1: All bookings are handled through our online consultation form. We review proposals weekly and select projects that align with our style.
faq.a2: Rates vary based on complexity, size, and placement. A day rate is available for large-scale projects. Estimates are provided after the initial consultation.
faq.a3: Cover-ups are taken on a very selective basis. Please include a clear, well-lit photo of the existing tattoo in your inquiry.
faq.q4: How should I prepare for my session?
faq.a4: Get a full night's sleep, eat a substantial meal beforehand, and avoid alcohol for 24 hours prior. We will provide full aftercare instructions post-session.

contact.subtitle: Inquiries
contact.description: We operate primarily by appointment to ensure every client receives undivided architectural and artistic focus.
contact.step1_desc: Send your concept, placement, and reference material via WhatsApp.
contact.step2_desc: Our artists review your request to ensure it aligns with our capability and style.
contact.step3_desc: A deposit secures your date. We finalize the design together in the studio.
